segments.text: I could not believe Light found a way through, he misses the down smash, but another miss from the back air, he's too high percent, maybe that 15 at the beginning was the ticket to keep him alive here, and Raru just mashing down tilts in the corner, manages to close it out.

full_text: I could not believe Light found a way through, he misses the down smash, but another miss from the back air, he's too high percent, maybe that 15 at the beginning was the ticket to keep him alive here, and Raru just mashing down tilts in the corner, manages to close it out.
